configurePresets.name: win-dev
configurePresets.description: Dev build — unity OFF + /DEBUG:FASTLINK incremental linking + PCH for fast single-file rebuilds (~10s vs ~2min). FINCEPT_DEV_BUILD drives the dev-only tweaks in CMakeLists.txt.

configurePresets.name: win-release
configurePresets.description: Release build for Windows x64. Run from a Visual Studio Developer Command Prompt (or vcvars64.bat) so MSVC, SDK headers, and Ninja are on PATH. Set QT_DIR env var or CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH to your Qt installation.

configurePresets.name: linux-release
configurePresets.description: Release build for Linux x86_64. Set QT_DIR env var or CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH to your Qt installation if not using system packages.

configurePresets.name: macos-release
configurePresets.description: Release build for macOS. Set QT_DIR env var or CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH to your Qt installation.
